text:
the 7 Bhava be without a Grah (without strength) and without
benefic aspect, the female born will have a coward and contemptible
th
wretch for her husband. When the 7 Bhava is a moveable Rāśi, the
th
husband will always be away from home. If Budh and Śani be in the 7
Bhava, the husband of the woman concerned will be impotent. If Sūrya
th
occupies the 7 Bhava, the woman concerned is abandoned by her
th
husband. If Mangal be in the 7 , the female concerned becomes a widow
th
in her childhood. If Śani be in the 7 , she lives to an old age, remaining
unmarried. If there be a malefic, she becomes a widow, while young. If
th
there be a benefic in the 7 , the female born will enjoy marital happiness
th
and will be chaste. If there be both benefics and malefics in the 7 , both
benefic and evil effects will be experienced. If Mangal be in the Navams of
Śukr and Śukr be in the Navams of Mangal, the female concerned will have
th
illicit relations with other men.
